히브리서 1:1.content: God, having in the past spoken to the fathers through the prophets at many times and in various ways,

히브리서 1:2.content: has at the end of these days spoken to us by his Son, whom he appointed heir of all things, through whom also he made the worlds.

히브리서 1:3.content: His Son is the radiance of his glory, the very image of his substance, and upholding all things by the word of his power, who, when he had by himself purified us of our sins, sat down on the right hand of the Majesty on high,

히브리서 1:4.content: having become as much better than the angels as the more excellent name he has inherited is better than theirs.

히브리서 1:5.content: For to which of the angels did he say at any time, “You are my Son. Today I have become your father?” and again, “I will be to him a Father, and he will be to me a Son?”

히브리서 1:6.content: When he again brings in the firstborn into the world he says, “Let all the angels of God worship him.”

히브리서 1:7.content: Of the angels he says, “He makes his angels winds, and his servants a flame of fire.”

히브리서 1:8.content: But of the Son he says, “Your throne, O God, is forever and ever. The scepter of uprightness is the scepter of your Kingdom.

히브리서 1:9.content: You have loved righteousness and hated iniquity; therefore God, your God, has anointed you with the oil of gladness above your fellows.”

히브리서 1:10.content: And, “You, Lord, in the beginning, laid the foundation of the earth. The heavens are the works of your hands.

히브리서 1:11.content: They will perish, but you continue. They all will grow old like a garment does.

히브리서 1:12.content: You will roll them up like a mantle, and they will be changed; but you are the same. Your years won’t fail.”

히브리서 1:13.content: But which of the angels has he told at any time, “Sit at my right hand, until I make your enemies the footstool of your feet?”

히브리서 1:14.content: Aren’t they all serving spirits, sent out to do service for the sake of those who will inherit salvation?
